code:
%%{Education_ContentCDN}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle (Education_LMS_Portal)

[Education_LMS_Portal] --> DRAFT : ReportInitiated
note right of DRAFT
  Create report shell:
  • incident/ref IDs bound
  • scope, timeline, owners
  • initial checklist opened
end note

DRAFT --> DATA_GATHER : EvidenceRequested
note right of DATA_GATHER
  Collect evidence:
  • SIEM logs, ledger snapshots
  • config diffs, patches
  • governance directives
end note

DATA_GATHER --> AUTHORING : EvidenceCollected
note right of AUTHORING
  Compile narrative:
  • root cause, impact, fixes
  • timelines & tables
  • redactions planned
end note

AUTHORING --> LEGAL_REVIEW : DraftReady
LEGAL_REVIEW --> ETHICS_REVIEW : LegalCleared
ETHICS_REVIEW --> QA_REVIEW : EthicsCleared
QA_REVIEW --> SIGNING : QAApproved

%% Signing & generation
SIGNING --> GENERATED : ReportGenerated (Education_StudentDB)
note right of GENERATED
  Immutable bundle produced:
  • hashes, signatures, timestamp
  • public & internal versions
end note

GENERATED --> PUBLISHING : PublishRequested
PUBLISHING --> PUBLISHED : TransparencyReportPublished (Education_GradeSync)
PUBLISHED --> ARCHIVED : ArchiveScheduled
ARCHIVED --> [Education_LMS_Portal]

%% Corrections / amendments
PUBLISHED --> AMEND_REQ : CorrectionRequested
AMEND_REQ --> AUTHORING : AmendmentAuthorized

%% Exceptions / failure paths
DATA_GATHER --> FAILED : MissingEvidence / HashMismatch
AUTHORING --> FAILED : IncompleteNarrative
LEGAL_REVIEW --> FAILED : LegalBlock
ETHICS_REVIEW --> FAILED : EthicsBlock
QA_REVIEW --> FAILED : QAFailed
SIGNING --> FAILED : SignatureError
PUBLISHING --> FAILED : PublishError
FAILED --> [Education_LMS_Portal] : ReportAbandoned

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,DATA_GATHER,AUTHORING,LEGAL_REVIEW,ETHICS_REVIEW,QA_REVIEW,SIGNING,GENERATED,PUBLISHING,PUBLISHED,ARCHIVED,AMEND_REQ,FAILED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育内容CDN设计一个透明度报告生命周期流程。起点是Education_LMS_Portal，当报告被触发时进入DRAFT状态。这里要记录事件ID、范围和时间线。
明白，DRAFT之后应该是证据收集阶段对吗？我看到需要收集SIEM日志和账本快照。这个状态叫DATA_GATHER，触发条件是EvidenceRequested？
对，证据收集完成后进入AUTHORING编写阶段，要整理根因分析和影响评估。然后必须经过三道审查：LEGAL_REVIEW、ETHICS_REVIEW和QA_REVIEW。
好的，我已经把主线画出来了：DRAFT → DATA_GATHER → AUTHORING → LEGAL_REVIEW → ETHICS_REVIEW → QA_REVIEW。QA通过后会进入SIGNING阶段，对吗？
是的，SIGNING之后生成不可篡改的报告包，这个状态叫GENERATED，要关联Education_StudentDB做哈希和签名。然后进入PUBLISHING，最终发布到Education_GradeSync。
PUBLISHED之后直接结束吗？还是需要考虑后续的修正流程？
需要两个分支：一是正常归档，PUBLISHED → ARCHIVED，然后回到Education_LMS_Portal；二是修正流程，如果有人请求更正，走AMEND_REQ回到AUTHORING重新编辑。

每个阶段都可能失败，我加上FAILED状态作为汇聚点：DATA_GATHER可能证据缺失，AUTHORING可能叙述不完整，LEGAL_REVIEW可能被法律阻断，ETHICS_REVIEW可能有伦理问题，QA_REVIEW可能QA失败，SIGNING可能签名错误，PUBLISHING可能发布失败。最终FAILED都回到Education_LMS_Portal标记为ReportAbandoned。
完美，所有核心状态和异常路径都覆盖了。请把主流程的状态用橙色高亮标记，方便一眼看清正常生命周期。
已完成。SM-10.02透明度报告生命周期图已经绘制完毕，包含13个核心状态、完整的审查链、修正回路以及7条失败路径，所有主线状态已应用橙色高亮样式。
